description: AGAT-converted prok GFF3: synthetic mRNA/exon fools detector (doc §6.1)
xfail_reason: doc ANNOTATION_REQUIREMENTS_AND_FILTERING.md §6.1: AGAT-converted prokaryote GFF3 gains synthetic mRNA/exon rows, so _looks_prokaryotic returns False and the detector misclassifies it as generic_eukaryote. When the detector is fixed, this xpasses -> flip to a happy case.

detect.xfail_reason: doc ANNOTATION_REQUIREMENTS_AND_FILTERING.md §6.1: AGAT-converted prokaryote GFF3 gains synthetic mRNA/exon rows, so _looks_prokaryotic returns False and the detector misclassifies it as generic_eukaryote. When the detector is fixed, this xpasses -> flip to a happy case.
